target.extraction_prompt: Extract the top 3 article headlines and the number of points they currently have. Ignore job postings or navigational text.

content:
Top 3 Hacker News Articles:

1. Project Glasswing: An Initial Update - 75 points

2. Why Japanese companies do so many different things - 343 points

3. U.S. researchers face new restrictions on publishing with foreign collaborators - 224 points
